jokers.name: Abstract Joker
jokers.description: +3 Mult for each Joker card

jokers.name: Blackboard
jokers.description: X3 Mult if all cards held in hand are Spades or Clubs

jokers.name: Crafty Joker
jokers.description: +4 Chips if played hand contains a Flush

jokers.name: Droll Joker
jokers.description: +4 Mult if played hand contains a Flush

jokers.name: Fibonacci
jokers.description: +8 Mult when an Ace, 2, 3, 5, or 8 is scored

jokers.name: Four Fingers
jokers.description: All Flushes and Straights can be made with 4 cards

jokers.name: Gluttonous Joker
jokers.description: +3 Mult when a Club card is scored

jokers.name: Greedy Joker
jokers.description: +3 Mult when a Diamond card is scored

jokers.name: Joker
jokers.description: +4 Mult

jokers.name: Jolly Joker
jokers.description: +8 Mult if played hand contains a Pair

jokers.name: Lusty Joker
jokers.description: +3 Mult when a Heart card is scored

jokers.name: Runner
jokers.description: Gains +15 Chips if played hand contains a Straight

jokers.name: Scary Face
jokers.description: +30 Chips when a face card is scored

jokers.name: Shortcut
jokers.description: Allows Straights to be made with gaps of 1 rank

jokers.name: Sly Joker
jokers.description: +50 Chips if played hand contains a Pair

jokers.name: Smeared Joker
jokers.description: Hearts and Diamonds count as same suit; Spades and Clubs count as same suit

jokers.name: Space Joker
jokers.description: 1-in-4 chance to upgrade the level of the played poker hand

jokers.name: Steel Joker
jokers.description: Gives X0.2 Mult for each Steel Card in your full deck

jokers.name: Supernova
jokers.description: Adds the number of times the played poker hand has been played to Mult

jokers.name: The Tribe
jokers.description: X2 Mult if played hand contains a Flush

jokers.name: Wrathful Joker
jokers.description: +3 Mult when a Spade card is scored

jokers.name: Zany Joker
jokers.description: +12 Mult if played hand contains a Three of a Kind
